title: Subitem mirror parent item
excerpt:
Is there anyway for a Subitem field to pick up the value of the parent item field.  In my example, I want the due date of the sub item to be the same as the related parent item. 
I know you can relate a subitem to a boar…

posts.author: mchinsky (Mark Chinsky)
posts.cookedHtml:
Is there anyway for a Subitem field to pick up the value of the parent item field. In my example, I want the due date of the sub item to be the same as the related parent item.

I know you can relate a subitem to a board, but I don’t see how you relate it to the ‘parent item’ row of the subitem

posts.author: SailorsMoon (AL)
posts.cookedHtml:
Absolutely what I am waiting for, too.

This would be very (very!) useful for using pivot tables as well, because then you can analyze sub-items combined with data of their parent items.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey all,

We developed an app that solves this exact pain point of subitems inherting column value from parent.

On creation - Populate item’s data into its subitems in a seamless way

Screenshot 2023-09-11 at 18.31.152226×400 30.1 KB

On change - Being able to set dependency between a subitem to an item

Screenshot 2023-09-11 at 18.30.162106×432 27.6 KB

It’s brand new (released last week) and we’re going to keep on adding new capabilities.

You can check it out here - https://monday.com/marketplace/10000287

Hope that helps!

posts.author: mw01 (MW)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there anyway around an app and just do this through the actual Monday system?
